title: Calama, AN — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Calama is a city in AN with a population of 180,000. The heart of Chile’s copper mining industry, a high-desert city near the world’s largest open-pit copper mine.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
